## StateSelector.filter() method

Checks if the value of the selector has changed.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
filter?(newValue: ReturnType, oldValue: ReturnType): boolean;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  newValue | ReturnType | The new value. |
|  oldValue | ReturnType | The old value. |

<b>Returns:</b>

boolean

True if the value has really changed.

## Remarks

This function exist because Vue will not stop reactivity propagation if the observed variable is an `object`<!-- -->, an `Array`<!-- -->, or the `deep` mode has been enabled.
